title: ProDec 55cm x 25m Pre-Masked Polythene Dust Sheet Roll, Dustproof and Waterproof Ideal for Covering and Protecting Floors and Furniture When Painting and Decorating
features: Lightweight yet effective dustproof, waterproof and recyclable LDPE polythene dust sheet for protecting walls, floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust and dirt
Top edge pre-masked with low tack grade ProDec Precision Edge masking tape, enabling the sheet to be secured in place - ideal for masking off walls and windows when rolling or spraying ceilings
Static charge helps the sheet to cling horizontally and vertically to almost any surface
25m long sheet supplied in a compact, fold-out roll that can be cut to size to minimise wastage
55cm (21") width ideal for smaller jobs and protecting the tops of walls when spraying ceilings
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Pre-masked polythene dust sheet roll Guards against paint & dust Protects walls, floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust and dirt. Especially ideal when spraying. Pre-masked to stay in place A pre-applied strip of ProDec's Precision Edge masking tape secures the sheet in place, with a low tack adhesive grade ensuring it won't damage delicate surfaces. Bleed-free paint edges Precision Edge tape is made using Japanese rice paper that has excellent barrier properties and eliminates paint bleed for the crispest of edges. Static cling to surfaces Handy particularly for walls and other flat surfaces, the sheet has a static charge that helps keep it in position. This pre-masked polythene dust sheet roll upgrades standard polythene sheeting with the addition of a strip of ProDec's Precision Edge masking tape plus a static charge to help it cling to almost all horizontal and vertical surfaces. The dustproof, waterproof and recyclable LDPE sheeting gives lightweight yet effective protection against dust, dirt, drips, splashes and spills of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids and Precision Edge not only enables the sheet to be secured in place, it prevents paint bleed, with a low tack grade adhesive that ensures newly painted or delicate surfaces aren't damaged when the tape is removed. Ideal for protecting floors and furniture like other polythene sheets, the tape also enables you to mask off walls and windows when rolling or spraying ceilings. It is supplied in a 25m roll folded to a compact size - simply apply the masking tape to the desired length, cut the roll to minimise wastage, then unfold the sheet full or part way. Available in 30cm, 55cm, 110cm and 180cm widths - all 25m roll length. More temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
